signals.title: Oil / Geopolitical
signals.text: Watch for potential risk-off at Sydney open as WTI oil trades above $94.5 and Strait of Hormuz tensions escalate. Key level to watch: USD/JPY 159.33

signals.title: AUD Setup
signals.text: AUD/USD net long positioning at 74.3% with retail 13% long / 87% short; watch for reversal risk into Sydney open at 0.7151

signals.title: CAD/JPY Watch
signals.text: BoC and BoJ meetings this week; watch for CAD/JPY volatility at open, currently at 116.572

signals.title: Yield Curve Note
signals.text: US yield curve in bull flattener regime; 2s10s spread at +52.0bp, watch for implications on CB divergence and risk narrative

signals.title: CAD/EUR — G8 Bilateral Theme
signals.text: CAD outperforms as G8 leader, EUR lags; watch for bilateral theme at open. CAD 1W avg: +0.431%, EUR 1W avg: -0.481%, G8 spread: 0.912%
